{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mantle of Suriel
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Mantle of Suriel]] appears like a river of burning light tied around the neck.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] wears the [[Mantle of Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Mantle of Suriel]] is a river of raging white flame that hangs from [[Suriel]]'s back like a cape.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Suriel]] uses the [[Mantle of Suriel]] to catch the wave of chaos-fire.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
